_comment: Localised strings for tenant ecolaundry (Ecolaundry). Lang: en. Source of truth: this file. ES is the base catalogue; every key here must mirror the keys in es.json.
location: Which laundry are you at right now?
greetingOpen: Tell me, how can I help you?
locationClarification: Sorry, can you tell me where the laundry is?
locationInsist: I need to know where you are to help. Where is the laundry?
mataroStreet: We have two laundromats in Mataró: C/ Francisco de Goya 117 and C/ Alemanya 17. Which one are you at?
mataroStreetInsist: If you don't recognize the address, look around: do you see {landmarks} nearby?
machineType: Is it a washer or a dryer?
machineNumberRetry: Could you check the machine number and tell me?
machineTypeRetry: If you're not sure, look at the label on the machine: washers are usually marked with an L and dryers with an S or D. Is it a washer or a dryer?
displayWasher: What exactly appears on the washer screen?
displayDryer: What exactly appears on the dryer screen?
displayMachine: What exactly appears on the machine screen? If nothing shows up, just tell me so we know.
centralReturnedChange: Did the central return your change?
centralRetryAfterReview: You may have entered the wrong machine number. Please check the balance on the central and try again with the correct number. Tell me if the machine has now activated.
resolvedWasher: ✅ Perfect. The washer has started correctly.
resolvedMachine: ✅ Perfect. The machine has started correctly.
empathyAngry: Understood, I'm sorry for the situation and I want to help. We'll look into it as soon as possible. Which laundry are you at?
mixedIncidentSlowDown: I understand, let's go step by step to help you. Which laundry are you at?
reassurance: ⚠️ We will review your case manually.
doubleChargeReview: ⚠️ We need to escalate your case to an operator for review.
doubleChargeAllReceived: We have received all the information we need, we will review your case.
noPhotoEscalate: ⚠️ Without screen information or photo, we will review your case manually to help you.
reaffirmEscalate: We will review your case manually. What is your name?
displayInstructionFailureEscalate: ⚠️ If nothing worked, please use another washer. We need to notify the operator so they can review the case and possible compensation.
resumeAfterFaq: Shall we continue with your issue?
displayShort: What exactly appears on the screen?
displayReaskAfterFailure: Please write only the exact code that appears on the screen now, even if it is the same as before.
displayUnrecognizedReask: I don't quite recognise that code. Could you check again?
paymentAsk: Were you able to make the payment?
numericCodeAskLetters: Thanks. Do you see any letter before the numbers?
numericCodeIncoherence: Got it. I'm passing this to a manual review.
almDoorGuidance: That message may indicate a closing issue or a garment caught in the door. Carefully open the door, check for any caught garment and close it firmly again. Please tell me if the message has disappeared.
doubleChargeAskUsed: Thanks. Were you able to wash or dry the clothes?
doubleChargeAskNarrative: Got it. Please explain step by step what you have done since you came in. Is it possible you swiped your card more than once at the payment terminal?
doubleChargeAskCardDigits: Thanks. To review it properly, I need the last 4 digits of the card.
cardDigitsRetry: I need exactly the last 4 digits of the card. Could you write them again?
doubleChargeAskReceipt: Perfect. Now I need a screenshot of the payment.
doubleChargeClosure: Thanks. With that data we will review it and send you the refund form. Next time, before paying again, contact us and we will help you right away.
unknownDisplayEscalate: Code {display} requires manual review. We'll pass your case for review to help you properly.
code001Explain: Got it. This message can appear when the program was selected before payment and the state didn't reset properly.
code001Escalate: We'll review it manually to help you in the best way possible.
countdownGuidance: The machine is finishing its cycle. Please wait for the countdown to end and the screen to show END — you will then be able to open the door.
discountCodeAsk: I'll help you. Tell me the exact code as you see it.
discountCodeAskLocation: Which town / laundry do you want to use it at?
discountCodeLocationReask: I don't recognise that name. Please tell me the exact laundry: Hortes, Goya, Alemanya, Pineda, L'Escala or Platja d'Aro.
discountCodeAskMachineNumber: Which machine number do you want to use?
discountCodeAskDoor: Is it loaded and with the door closed?
discountCodeFinalEscalate: Give me a minute, we'll do the checks. If the code is correct, we'll activate the machine for you. 🙂
discountCodeFormatInvalid: The code doesn't match the expected format, we'll review it manually.
discountCodeFormatRetry: That code doesn't match the format we expect. Could you double-check and type it again, please?
al001GuideRetry: This message usually appears when the process was not done in the correct order. I'll help you complete it: tell me what you did just before it appeared.
al001Resolved: Great, issue resolved. Anything else you need?
noChangeResolved: Great, all sorted. Anything else you need?
loyaltyCardRecharge: Insert the card and follow the instructions on the central unit. If you see anything unusual, tell me and we'll check it.
loyaltyCardBuyBase: The loyalty card costs 20€ in cash and only works in the store where it was bought. Which laundry are you at?
loyaltyCardWrongLocation: ⚠️ The card bought at {buyLocation} only works at that location. It's not valid here at {currentLocation}. If you need a card for this laundry, you can buy one here for €20 in cash.
faqClosure: Great. If you need anything else, just let me know.
invoiceAskLocation: Sure, I'll help you with the invoice. 🙂 Which laundry did you use?
invoiceAskMachineType: Thanks. Did you use a washer or a dryer?
invoiceAskDate: Which day did you use the service? (you can say "today", "yesterday" or a date)
invoiceAskCoste: What was the total cost of the service?
invoiceAskEmail: Which email should we send the invoice to?
invoiceAskEmailRetry: That email doesn't look valid. Could you write it again, please?
invoiceAskNotes: Would you like to add any notes or observations for the invoice? (If you have nothing to add, write "no".)
invoiceFinal:
Thanks {name}, we'll send you the invoice for {fecha} to your email: {email}. 📧

🔒 Your data (company name, tax ID, address, email) is used only to issue the invoice and is not shared with third parties.
angryCustomerEmpathic: I understand your frustration and want to help. We will review it as soon as possible. Which laundry are you at?
locationGatedNotDocumented: We don't have this type of issue documented at {location}. We'll review it manually to help you.
compensationReview: Let us take a closer look at your case to offer you the best solution. 🙏
refundAskData: We'll review it with you. To process it, I need the last 4 digits of the card, a screenshot of the payment, and a brief summary.
refundEscalateNoPromise: I understand. We will pass the case for review to apply the most appropriate solution.
insistLocationFollowUp: To help you, I first need to know exactly which laundry you are at.
landmarkEnumerationAsk: Look around you: do you see any of these nearby? {landmarks}
openingHoursDefault: General opening hours are 8:00 to 22:00 every day of the year.
hoursAsk: Which town or laundry are you at?
pricesAsk: Which town or laundry are you at?
howToUseAsk: Which town or laundry are you at? Instructions vary by location.
priceWarning: Prices vary by laundry. Which one are you at, and do you need washer or dryer info?
paymentCardOnly: ⚠️ This laundromat accepts credit card only.
paymentTpvExact: 💡 The card terminal charges the exact amount of **{amount}€** (no change given).
pricesDryerHint: Would you also like dryer info?
pricesWasherHint: Would you also like washer info?
faqConfirmRepeatDryer: I didn't quite understand. Would you also like dryer pricing info? (yes / no)
faqConfirmRepeatWasher: I didn't quite understand. Would you also like washer pricing info? (yes / no)
programsAsk: Which town or laundry are you at?
programsNoData: I don't have program information for this laundry. Please check the labels on the machine.
unknownLocationList: I don't recognize that location. Our laundromats are: {list}. Which one are you at?
defaultHelp: Tell me the next useful detail and I'll help step by step.
operatorHandoffFinal: A human operator will take over your case. Please wait a moment while they review the situation. The chatbot will be deactivated.
escalationCaseReviewLead: Thanks, {name}. We'll review your case manually.
refundFormFinal:
Thanks, {name}! 🙏 We have received all the information needed for your case. Here is the refund form, please complete it when you can: {refundFormUrl}

We will review your situation. If you need anything else, I'm here to help. 💚
flowResumePrompt: Shall we continue with the laundry issue?
flowEngineEscalate: A human operator will take care of your case as soon as possible. 🙏 May I have your name, please?
_section_washer_flow: Prompts for washer_hs60xx.json machine flow nodes
washerStep0Confirm: No worries, let's sort it out. Have you already completed the payment at the payment unit?
washerPayHelp:
No problem.

1. Go to the payment unit.
2. Insert coins or use your card.
3. Select your machine number.
4. Press the programme button.
5. Close the door.
washerPayRetry: Were you able to complete the payment?
washerDisplayCheckPrompt: What exactly appears on the screen? Please write only the exact code or value you see.
washerDisplayCheckFallback: Thanks. Please write only the exact code shown on the screen. If it's not recognised, I'll connect you with an operator.
washerCaseBlankDisplay:
Got it. If nothing appears on the screen, the washer may be stopped.

1. Press whichever programme you want.
2. Tell me if it starts or if nothing happens.
washerCaseSel:
This message means the machine is waiting for selection. Please check that you correctly pressed the machine number on the payment unit.

Then tell me if the washer has started.
washerCasePrice:
The screen is showing the remaining amount.

1. Insert coins or use your card until the screen changes to **PUSH**.
2. Tell me if it works.
washerCasePush:
To start the wash, please press a programme button on the machine.

Available programmes:

- **60º** (very hot) → ideal for heavily soiled, white or workwear
- **40º** (warm) → perfect for normal laundry (cotton, colours)
- **30º** (gentle) → suitable for delicate or synthetic fabrics
- **COLD** → recommended for very delicate items (wool, silk, etc.)

Select one and press the button on the machine. Then tell me if the washer has started.
washerCaseExtraButton:
A fixed **EXTRA** button usually means the EXTRA option was selected earlier, so the machine is still waiting for additional money for that option.

Do you want the **EXTRA** option? Reply **YES** if you want it, **NO** if you don't.
washerCaseExtraRemove:
If you do **not** want the **EXTRA** option:

1. Press the **EXTRA** button or the stuck buttons to switch them off.
2. Then continue with the normal wash steps.
3. Tell me if it works.
washerCaseExtraPayMore:
If you **do** want the **EXTRA** option:

1. Add the missing amount for the **EXTRA** option.
2. Then continue with the normal wash steps.
3. Tell me if it works.
washerCaseDisponible:
Got it. The balance is available but the payment has not yet been completed on the machine. Please press the button for the machine you selected, press firmly for a few seconds until you see the available balance disappear and receive your change.

Once done, go back to the washer and tell me what the screen shows.
washerFollowupDisponible: Has the balance disappeared and have you received your change? What does the washer screen show now?
washerFollowupDisponibleFallback: Thanks. Please write only the exact code shown on the screen. If it's not recognised, I'll connect you with an operator.
washerCaseDoor: The door is not closed properly. Open it and close it firmly, then try again. Tell me if the washer has started.
washerCaseAlm:
Which alarm do you see?

1. **ALM/A**
2. **ALM/E**
3. **ALM/DOOR**
4. **ALM/VAr**
5. Another **ALM** code
washerCaseAlmFallback: Thanks. If the alarm code doesn't match a documented case, I won't guess the diagnosis. The case needs manual review by an operator.
washerCaseAlmA:
**ALM/A** indicates a water inlet alarm.

1. Press **STOP** once with a short press, less than one second.
2. This tells the washer to try to resume the wash from the point where the alarm appeared.
3. Try the wash again.
4. Tell me if it works.
washerCaseAlmE:
**ALM/E** indicates a drain blockage alarm.

1. Press **STOP** once with a short press, less than one second.
2. Wait a few minutes in case the washer is still draining.
3. Try the wash again.
4. Tell me if it works.
washerCaseAlmDoor: Got it. This message may indicate a closing problem or a trapped garment. Carefully open the door, check for any trapped garment and close it firmly again.
washerCaseAlmDoorCheck: Good. Please tell me if the message has disappeared.
washerCaseAlmDoorPersist: Thanks. We will escalate your case for review to help you in the best possible way.
washerCaseAlmVar: ⚠️ **ALM/VAr** is an inverter alarm and usually requires technical review. We need to notify the operator to check the washer.
washerCaseAlmUnknown: ⚠️ That code doesn't match any documented case, so it needs manual review. We need to notify the operator to check it.
washerCaseAl001:
**AL001** indicates a sequence error.

Please restart the full process in this order:
1. Load the washer.
2. Close the door.
3. Go to the payment unit and pay.
4. Select the machine number and collect your change if applicable.
5. Go to the selected machine and choose the programme.
6. Let me know if it works.
washerCaseEnd:
Do you see only **END**, or **END** with another code on the screen?

1. Only **END**
2. **END** with another code
washerCaseEndFallback: Thanks. If the screen shows only END, choose option 1. If END appears with another code, choose option 2 so we can verify it safely.
washerCaseEndOnly: Perfect 👍 I see **END** on the screen. If the washer still doesn't start, press whichever programme you want and tell me if anything changes.
washerCaseEndUnknown: ⚠️ Thanks for indicating the additional code next to **END**. That code is not in our documented list, so I won't guess the diagnosis. We need to notify the operator for a manual check.
washerCheckResult: Once you've done that, tell me if the machine has started working.
washerFollowupDisplay: Please write only what you see on the screen — the numbers and letters exactly as they appear now, even if it's the same as before.
washerFollowupDisplayFallback: Thanks. Please write the exact code from the screen. If it's still unclear, I'll pass it to manual review.
washerCaseDoorPersist: ⚠️ The door is still locked even after repeating the steps. This indicates a possible mechanical fault in the door latch. We need to notify the operator now to check the washer manually.
washerCaseSelPersist: ⚠️ The screen is still showing SEL even after repeating the selection. We need to notify the operator now to check the washer manually.
washerCasePushPersist: ⚠️ The screen is still showing PUSH even after trying to press the programme button. This means the machine is not responding to the command. We need to notify the operator now to check the washer manually.
washerCaseAl001Persist: ⚠️ The screen is still showing **AL001** after correctly repeating the sequence. We need to notify the operator to review the case manually.
washerCaseBlankFollowup: ⚠️ The screen is still blank and the washer is still unresponsive. We need to notify the operator to check it manually.
washerEscalatePay: ⚠️ We need to notify the operator to help you with the payment issue.
washerEscalate: ⚠️ Would you allow an agent to call you to help quickly? We'll activate another washer for you. You'll need to move your laundry; select a free one while I find an agent to help you.
washerOk: ✅ Perfect. The washer has started correctly.
washerStopStep0: Did you press STOP before the wash had actually started?
washerStopBeforeStart: If the wash hadn't actually started yet, you can simply select the correct programme again and start the washer. In that case the wash cycle was not cancelled mid-cycle.
washerStopFirstTimeCheck: Is this the first time this has happened?
washerStopFirstTimeEscalate:
Pressing **STOP** cancels the wash cycle completely and the payment for that cycle is lost. Since this is your first time, **we'll reactivate it for free** and notify the operator to manage it.

Important: from next time, if you press **STOP** with the wash already started, the payment is lost and you'll need to pay again.
washerStopRepayRequired: Pressing **STOP** cancels the wash cycle completely and the payment for that interrupted cycle is lost. The only way to restart the washer is to **pay again**. The free reactivation only applies the first time this happens.
washerPostCicloStep0:
What happened after the wash?

1. Very wet laundry
2. Locked door
3. Damaged laundry
4. No foam
5. Another issue
washerPostCicloWet: Did the screen show **END** together with another code?
washerPostCicloWetBalanced: Thanks for indicating the code detail. That screen state is not in our documented list, so I won't guess the diagnosis. We need to notify the operator for a manual check.
washerPostCicloWetOverload:
The washer was probably overloaded or the laundry wasn't well balanced inside the drum. This is common with duvets, pillows, rugs or other bulky items that absorb a lot of water.

1. Wash the laundry again, splitting the load into **two washers** and leaving enough space for the laundry to move properly.
2. Do **not** put soaking laundry directly into the dryer — it won't dry well and the filter may be damaged.
3. If you rewash the separated laundry because this wash didn't spin, **we'll compensate for this wash that didn't spin**.
4. Please avoid overloading the washer again, as next time we may not be able to help.
washerPostCicloDoor:
The door may take 2 to 3 minutes to unlock.

1. Please wait a moment.
2. Try again.
washerPostCicloDamage: I'll notify the operator. They will review the case. Compensation is not automatic.
washerPostCicloFoam: Little foam is normal. Industrial detergent produces less visible foam but cleans just as well.
washerPostCicloEscalate: A human operator will handle your case as soon as possible. Would you accept a phone call from one of our agents to help you now?
_section_dryer_flow: Prompts for dryer_ed340.json machine flow nodes
dryerStep0Confirm: Have you already paid for the dryer and has the cycle started?
dryerPayHelp:
Please complete the payment at the unit and select the dryer number to start the cycle.

Then tell me if the dryer has started.
dryerProblemCheck: What exactly appears on the screen?
dryerDoorIssue:
It looks like a door issue. Please check there's no laundry caught in the seal and close the door firmly.

Then tell me if the dryer has started.
dryerReadyState:
The dryer is ready. Please select the programme and start the cycle.

Then tell me if the dryer has started.
dryerCreditIssue:
Please make sure payment is complete and start the dryer.

Then tell me if the dryer has started.
dryerAlarmState: Please tell me the alarm code shown on the screen.
dryerAlarmResolution: If the alarm matches a documented case, follow the corresponding reset instructions. If the code is not documented or reappears, the case needs manual review.
dryerRetryFlow: The code you mentioned is not one of the typical dryer codes. Can you look at the screen again and tell me exactly which letters or numbers appear? If the screen is blank or I don't recognise the code, we'll escalate to an operator.
dryerCheckResult: Once you've done that, tell me if the dryer has started working.
dryerFallback: Sorry for the inconvenience. Please use another dryer for now. An operator will review the case manually.
dryerEndSuccess: Great, the dryer is now working correctly.
dryerErrorStep0: What issue do you have with the dryer?
dryerSoakingWet: Very wet laundry usually means the washer didn't spin properly. Please wash the laundry again splitting the load into two machines. A new payment is required. If needed, the case can be reviewed manually after the new wash.
dryerNormalDamp: If the laundry is still damp, make sure the load is not too large and spread the laundry well. You can add more drying time.
dryerAlarmCase: Please tell me the alarm code shown on the screen.
dryerAlarmAction: If the alarm matches a documented case, follow the corresponding reset instructions. If the code is not documented or reappears, the case needs manual review.
dryerDamageBurnt: Burnt laundry usually happens when the temperature setting is not right. Please follow the garment care label. The case can be reviewed manually, but compensation is not automatic.
dryerDamagePlastic: Plastic sticking to laundry can happen if the drum was not checked before use. The case can be reviewed manually, but compensation is not automatic.
dryerDamageStained: Stains may come from the state of the drum. Please rewash the laundry with a pre-treatment. If needed, the case can be reviewed manually.
dryerGenericCase: Please try again with a smaller, well-spread load. If the problem continues, use another dryer.
dryerErrorCheckResult: Once you've done that, tell me if it has started working.
dryerErrorFallback: Please use another dryer. The case will be reviewed.
feedbackPositive: Thank you so much for your message! 😊 We're glad you're happy.
feedbackNegative: Thank you for your feedback, we will take note of it as soon as possible.
washDryTime: At Ecolaundry you can have all your clothes clean and dry in approximately 1 hour. The wash cycle takes between 30 and 45 minutes, and drying another 30-45 minutes depending on load size.
openingHours: Open 365 days a year, including holidays. Hours: 8:00am to 10:00pm. Last wash cycle: 9:00pm. No reservation needed, just come whenever you want.
washerCapacity: Our washers have a capacity of up to 20 kg. They are ideal for washing sheets, duvets, towels and pillows, items that don't fit in a home washing machine.
detergents: No, you don't need to bring anything. Ecolaundry machines automatically dispense eco-certified detergent and softener, made with 100% natural ingredients. Just bring your clothes.
paymentMethods: You can pay in three ways: contactless bank card, cash with coins, and the Ecolaundry App. Using the App also gets you promotions and gift credit for each top-up.
appDownload: The App is completely free. Search for Ecolaundry on the App Store and Google Play. With the App you can pay, see the remaining time of your cycle and get a notification when it's done.
colorTemperature: For colored clothes use cold or lukewarm water, between 20 and 30°C. Hot water opens the fibers and allows dye to escape. We also recommend turning clothes inside out before putting them in the drum to protect colors.
greaseStains: First absorb excess grease with paper towels without rubbing. Then use this program on our washers: resistant fabrics like cotton at 60°C; synthetics or delicates at 40°C. Our machines automatically apply detergent to dissolve grease.
mixedColors: Sort your clothes into three groups: darks, lights and brights. Never mix blacks with whites or bright colors: black can release dye.
machineHygiene: Yes. Machines are regularly cleaned and disinfected. Each industrial cycle guarantees drum hygiene. We use eco-friendly sanitizers safe for the whole family, including babies and people with sensitive skin.
ecoProducts: Yes. We use 100% eco-friendly soaps and softeners, certified and made with natural ingredients. Our machines also use less water and energy than home washers, caring for your clothes and the planet.
noFoamNormal: No worries 👍 It's normal not to see much foam. The washer automatically dispenses detergent and foam does not indicate whether it cleans better or worse.
doubleCharge: To verify double charging we need: store name, whether you completed the service or not, last 4 digits of your card and payment screenshot. If you completed the service: we'll send you the refund form https://forms.gle/XFGPAd9581AhC9eu7. If you didn't: next time before paying again, contact us and we'll help right away. We escalate if the amount doesn't match, the story is confusing or the customer is very upset.
paidButNotStarting: If you paid but the machine won't start, we need to know the location, whether it's a washer or dryer, and what the display shows. PUSH PROG: press the desired program. DOOR: open and close the door properly. 001: possible sequence error, we review it together. If the central didn't give change: check your balance at the central and press the correct button. We escalate if you've followed all steps and it still won't work.
errorAl001: The AL001 error appears when the process hasn't been done in the correct order. We'll help you complete it step by step. We escalate if the customer can't follow instructions or the error persists.
occupiedMachine: If someone else has finished their wash but is still using the washer, you can take out the clothes and leave them on a table at the laundry so you can use the machine. If the other person has a complaint, they can write to service@alberwaz.net. If the case remains conflictive, an operator will review it.
compensationCode: To use the code we need the exact code, the store name and the amount. If a small amount is missing, add the missing coins at the central. If the amount is more than the code, we escalate to generate a new code. We escalate if the code is incoherent, missing letters or a new code is needed.
refundRequest: To process a refund we need the last 4 digits of your card, a payment screenshot and a description of what happened. Refund form: https://forms.gle/XFGPAd9581AhC9eu7. Support email: service@alberwaz.net. We escalate if the request is urgent or the issue is complex.
invoiceRequest: Write to olga@alberwaz.net. Provide company name, email, laundry name, tax ID, address, date, details of machines used and notes.
loyaltyCard: The loyalty card costs €20 in cash and only works at the location where it was purchased. To buy it, press the second button on the right side of the central. To reload it, insert the card and follow the central's instructions.
locationDifferences: General hours: 8:00–10:00pm every day. L'Escala: 7:00am–11:00pm and no loyalty card. Prices: check the store database; if unsure, escalate. Goya: customer must clean the dryer filter, button central, €7 per unit card, gives change in coins. Pineda: button central, €8 per unit card, gives change in coins. Alemanya and Pineda: sometimes adding money to the dryer doesn't add minutes, then we escalate. Alemanya and Hortes: sometimes card payment doesn't work, possible AJAX restart. All machines are Girbau. Soap and softener included. Don't add personal products. Average wash: approximately 28 minutes. 15-minute dry: approximately 20 kg mixed laundry; 100% cotton needs more time.
howToUse:
To use the laundry, follow these steps:

1. **Put your clothes in the washer** and close the door.
2. **Go to the payment central** and make a payment by selecting the machine number you want to use.
3. **Return to the machine** and select your desired program and temperature.
4. **Come back to get your clothes** when the machine indicates it's done.

Detergent and softener are automatically dispensed. You don't need to bring anything.
howToUseDryer:
To use the dryer, follow these steps:

1. **Put your clothes in the dryer** and close the door.
2. **Go to the payment central** and make a payment by selecting the dryer number.
3. **Return to the dryer** and select your desired program (temperature).
4. **You can open the door during the cycle** if you need to add or check clothes.
5. If you want more drying time, **add money at the central up to 5 minutes before** the cycle ends.
6. **When done**, collect your clothes.
